home.title: I build solid, scalable web products that are ready for real business needs.
home.subtitle: Backend-first engineering with product vision and performance in mind.
home.description: I am Angelo Polgrossi, an advanced computer engineering student and developer focused on backend architecture, web platforms, and integrated solutions. I work on products that need speed, reliability, and a modern experience for the end user.
home.availability: Available for new projects and remote collaborations.

metrics.label: Experience
metrics.value: Web apps, microcontrollers, and internal systems

highlights: Scalable backend architecture and API design
Integration across frontend, backend, and cloud services
Automation, databases, and specialized internal software

about.headline: I combine backend, product thinking, and execution to turn ideas into useful software.
summary: I have built web platforms, administrative systems, microcomputer solutions, and internal tools for real business operations.
I am especially comfortable designing databases, APIs, authentication flows, admin panels, and processes where reliability is critical.
Although backend is my strongest area, I can also work with modern frontend stacks to deliver complete end-to-end products.

projects.title: EZPASS
projects.description: Web platform and microcomputer network for accounting and access control. Built with Laravel, Python, OpenCV, MySQL, and AWS, including offline synchronization.

projects.title: Colegio de Abogados del Estado Carabobo
projects.description: Website for member billing lookups built with PHP and SQL Server, focused on real administrative workflows.

projects.title: SOULBEAT
projects.description: Worked as a backend developer on database design, models, migrations, and real-time messaging with Pusher inside an XP-style collaborative workflow.

projects.title: FINANCY
projects.description: Personal finance web app tailored to the Venezuelan market, built with Laravel, React, Inertia, and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Bistrot Chef Remy
projects.description: Node.js and Express backend with authentication, administrative structure, and backend/frontend coordination under Scrum.

projects.title: Carnet App
projects.description: ID card generation app for association members using Python, OpenCV, Tkinter, and MySQL.

projects.title: Inventory
projects.description: Lightweight inventory app built with Python, Flet, and SQLite.

resume.title: Resume and professional profile
resume.description: Keep a downloadable resume always available while the portfolio highlights experience, stack, and featured projects.
resume.previewText: On desktop, the resume is displayed in an embedded preview. On mobile, some browsers may download the PDF automatically, so the experience is supported with direct actions.
